div.h2: CH VACD FHIR API CapabilityStatement for server

blockquote.p: Any FHIR capability may be 'allowed' by the system unless explicitly marked as 'SHALL NOT'. A few items are marked as MAY in the Implementation Guide to highlight their potential relevance to the use case.

div.p: The server will handle all resources and also complete vaccination documents

ul.li:
Supports the transactioninteraction described as follows:
Create/update resources as Batch or Transaction

div.p: The summary table lists the resources that are part of this configuration, and for each resource it lists:

ul.li: The interactions supported by each resource (Read, Search, Update, and Create, are always shown, while VRead, Patch, Delete, History on Instance, or History on Type are only present if at least one of the resources has support for them.

li.span: The required, recommended, and some optional search parameters (if any).

ul.li: The operations on the resource (if any)

b.title: GET all set of resources of the type (search interaction)
PUT a new resource version (update interaction)

tr.td: name, family, given, birthdate, gender, identifier, address

div.p: Code that identifies the allergy or intolerance
Who the sensitivity is for
Any identifier for the AllergyIntolerance.
Code for the condition
Who has the condition?
Any identifier for the Condition.
The patient for the vaccination record
Vaccine Product Administered
The target disease the dose is being administered against
Vaccination (non)-Administration Date
Any identifier for the Immunization.
The code of the observation type
The subject that the observation is about (if patient)
Any identifier for the Observation.
Returns medications for a specific code
Returns medications with this external identifier
Who and/or what the composition is about
Kind of composition
Generate export document according to the composition
The first resource in the bundle, if the bundle type is "document" - this is a composition, and this parameter provides access to search its contents
document
A portion of the organization's name or alias
Any identifier for the Organization.
A server defined search that may match any of the string fields in the HumanName, including family, give, prefix, suffix, suffix, and/or text
A portion of the family name of the patient
A portion of the given name of the patient
The patient's date of birth
Gender of the patient
A patient identifier
A server defined search that may match any of the string fields in the Address, including line, city, district, state, country, postalCode, and/or text
Generate export document according to the selected export type
A server defined search that may match any of the string fields in the HumanName, including family, give, prefix, suffix, suffix, and/or text
A portion of the family name
A portion of the given name of the patient
A patient identifier
A server defined search that may match any of the string fields in the Address, including line, city, district, state, country, postalCode, and/or text
A server defined search that may match any of the string fields in the HumanName, including family, give, prefix, suffix, suffix, and/or text
The patient this related person is related to
